title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 475.390 - When guardian appointed
text:
475.390.  When guardian appointed. — Whenever, pursuant to any law of the United States or regulation of the Veterans Administration, it is necessary, prior to payment of benefits, that a guardian be appointed, the appointment may be made in the manner herein provided.
(L. 1947 V. I p. 4 § 3)
